title: Ordering at a Cafe
transcript:
Barista: Hi there, welcome to Maple Cafe! What can I get started for you?
Customer: Hi, can I get a medium latte, please?
Barista: Sure thing. Would you like that hot or iced?
Customer: Hot, please. And could I add an extra shot of espresso?
Barista: Of course, that's an extra fifty cents. Anything else?
Customer: Yes, one blueberry muffin too.
Barista: Great choice. That'll be six dollars and twenty cents total.
Customer: Here you go. Oh, and could I get that muffin warmed up?
Barista: Absolutely, I'll pop it in the oven for a minute. Your name for the order?
Customer: It's Priya.
Barista: Perfect, Priya. Your latte and muffin will be ready at the counter in about five minutes.

questions.prompt: What drink did the customer order?
questions.explanation: The customer asked for a medium latte.

questions.prompt: What extra did the customer add to the drink?
questions.explanation: The customer asked for an extra shot of espresso, for fifty cents more.

questions.prompt: What food item did the customer buy?
questions.explanation: The customer also ordered a blueberry muffin.

questions.prompt: What was the total price?
questions.explanation: The barista said the total was six dollars and twenty cents.

questions.prompt: What name did the customer give for the order?
questions.explanation: The customer's name was Priya.

title: At the Train Station
transcript:
Announcer: Attention passengers, the 10:15 train to Riverside is now boarding on platform 3.
Traveler: Excuse me, is this the platform for the train to Riverside?
Station Staff: Yes, but you'll need to hurry, it leaves in about six minutes.
Traveler: Thank you! Do I need to change trains anywhere?
Station Staff: No, it's a direct route, about forty minutes non-stop.
Traveler: Great. One more thing, where can I buy a ticket?
Station Staff: There's a machine right behind you, or you can buy one on board for a small extra fee.
Traveler: I'll use the machine. Thanks for your help!
Announcer: Final boarding call for the 10:15 to Riverside, platform 3. The next train to Riverside departs at 11:45.

questions.prompt: Which platform is the Riverside train boarding on?
questions.explanation: The announcer says the train is boarding on platform 3.

questions.prompt: What time does the boarding train depart?
questions.explanation: The 10:15 train to Riverside is the one currently boarding.

questions.prompt: Does the traveler need to change trains?
questions.explanation: The station staff confirms it's a direct, non-stop route.

questions.prompt: About how long is the trip to Riverside?
questions.explanation: The staff says the direct route takes about forty minutes.

questions.prompt: Where does the traveler decide to buy a ticket?
questions.explanation: The traveler chooses to use the ticket machine instead of paying an extra fee on board.

title: A Short Interview
transcript:
Interviewer: Thanks for coming in today. Can you start by telling me a little about your background?
Candidate: Sure. I studied graphic design for three years and worked as an intern at a small design studio last summer.
Interviewer: What did you enjoy most about that internship?
Candidate: I really liked collaborating with the team on branding projects, seeing an idea grow from a sketch into a finished logo was exciting.
Interviewer: That's great. Why are you interested in working with us specifically?
Candidate: I've followed your studio's work for a while, and I admire how you balance bold color choices with clean layouts.
Interviewer: We appreciate that. Do you have any questions for me?
Candidate: Yes, what does a typical first project look like for a new designer here?
Interviewer: Usually a smaller client project, paired with a mentor for the first month. We'll be in touch by Friday with our decision.
Candidate: Thank you so much for your time today.

questions.prompt: What did the candidate study?
questions.explanation: The candidate says they studied graphic design for three years.

questions.prompt: Where did the candidate intern last summer?
questions.explanation: The candidate interned at a small design studio.

questions.prompt: What did the candidate enjoy most about the internship?
questions.explanation: The candidate liked collaborating with the team on branding projects.

questions.prompt: Why is the candidate interested in this studio specifically?
options: They admire the studio's bold colors and clean layouts
questions.explanation: The candidate admires how the studio balances bold color choices with clean layouts.

questions.prompt: When will the interviewer follow up with a decision?
questions.explanation: The interviewer says they'll be in touch by Friday.

title: Weather Report
transcript: Good morning, and here's your weather report for today. We're starting off with clear skies and a cool 8 degrees Celsius, but temperatures will climb quickly to a high of 19 degrees by early afternoon. Expect plenty of sunshine through midday, with a few scattered clouds rolling in around four o'clock. There's a light breeze from the west at about 10 kilometers per hour, so it should feel pleasant outside. Tonight, temperatures will drop back down to around 10 degrees, with a slight chance of light rain after midnight, only a twenty percent chance, so don't cancel your evening plans just yet. Tomorrow looks cooler and cloudier, with a high near 14 degrees. That's your forecast, enjoy the sunshine while it lasts!

questions.prompt: What is this morning's temperature?
questions.explanation: The report starts with a cool 8 degrees Celsius in the morning.

questions.prompt: What is the expected high temperature today?
questions.explanation: Temperatures climb to a high of 19 degrees by early afternoon.

questions.prompt: When do scattered clouds start rolling in?
questions.explanation: A few scattered clouds roll in around four o'clock.

questions.prompt: What is the chance of light rain tonight?
questions.explanation: There's only a twenty percent chance of light rain after midnight.

questions.prompt: How does tomorrow's weather compare to today's?
questions.explanation: Tomorrow looks cooler and cloudier, with a high near 14 degrees.
